hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let r='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>r+=d);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const d=JSON.parse(r);const c=d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command||'';if(c.includes('git commit')){const m=c.match(/-m ['\"]((?:[^'\"\\]|\\.)+)['\"]/);if(m){const dt=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const line='\n- '+dt+': '+m[1];fs.appendFileSync('docs/CHANGELOG.md',line);}}}catch(e){}});"
